name: Garden Harvest Bowl
description: Quinoa, roasted sweet potatoes, chickpeas, avocado, spinach, and tahini-lemon dressing.

name: Plant Power Burger
description: House-made lentil-mushroom patty, vegan cheese, caramelized onions, pickles, and smoky sauce in a vegan bun.

name: Creamy Cashew Alfredo Pasta
description: Fettuccine in a silky cashew-garlic sauce with sautéed mushrooms and fresh parsley.

name: Roasted Veggie Tacos
description: Corn tortillas filled with spiced peppers, zucchini, black beans, guacamole, and lime salsa.

name: Vegan Truffle Mushroom Pizza
description: Thin crust topped with plant-based mozzarella, mushrooms, truffle oil, and basil.
